data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) AS group_name,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ก' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_1_ก, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ก' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_1_ก,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ข' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_2_ข, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ข' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_2_ข,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ฉก' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_3_ฉก, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ฉก' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_3_ฉก,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ท' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_4_ท, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ท' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_4_ท,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ผ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_5_ผ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ผ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_5_ผ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'พ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_6_พ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'พ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_6_พ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ร' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_7_ร, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ร' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_7_ร,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ว' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_8_ว, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ว' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_8_ว,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ส' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_9_ส, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ส' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_9_ส,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สก' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_10_สก, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สก' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_10_สก,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สข' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_11_สข, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สข' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_11_สข,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สค' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_12_สค, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สค' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_12_สค,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สง' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_13_สง, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สง' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_13_สง,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สจ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_14_สจ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สจ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_14_สจ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สช' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_15_สช, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สช' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_15_สช,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สฐ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_16_สฐ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สฐ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_16_สฐ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สน' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_17_สน, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สน' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_17_สน,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สบ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_18_สบ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สบ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_18_สบ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สป' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_19_สป, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สป' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_19_สป,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สพ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_20_สพ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สพ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_20_สพ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สร' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_21_สร, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สร' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_21_สร,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สส' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_22_สส, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สส' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_22_สส,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สห' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_23_สห, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สห' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_23_สห,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สอ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_24_สอ, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'สอ' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_24_สอ,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ป' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS prin_25_ป, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'ป' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS int_25_ป,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount END),0) AS sum_prin, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' THEN sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount END),0) AS sum_int
FROM sc_com_m_receipt JOIN sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ON sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no JOIN sc_lon_m_contract ON sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no JOIN sc_lon_m_rule ON sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type LEFT JOIN sc_com_m_receipt_item ON sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no
WHERE sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id IN ('CLR','TRL') AND sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ส' --AND sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('01/09/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') AND TO_DATE('30/09/2025','dd/mm/yyyy')
GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
